name: Chest Dip
resistance_profile: Deep stretch on the lower chest at the bottom; lean forward to bias the chest.
cues: Descend to a comfortable deep stretch
execution_steps: Grip parallel bars and press up to a supported start position with your arms straight.
Lean your torso forward and let your feet drift slightly behind you to bias the chest.
Bend your elbows and lower under control to a comfortable deep stretch across the lower chest.
Press back up, keeping the forward lean, until your elbows are nearly straight.
good_when: You want a loaded stretch on the lower chest with a big bodyweight compound.
You can add weight with a belt or vest to keep progressing.
bad_when: You have shoulder pain or limited mobility at deep ranges.
You cannot yet support your bodyweight (regress to a machine press or push-up).
common_errors: Going too deep for the shoulder
